notes: top_scorer_team="FRA" does not match the picked player's nation (Mikel Oyarzabal → ESP). The team tag is a UI filter and is NOT scored; only the player (Mikel Oyarzabal) is scored. Looks like a stale leftover.

third_place_qualifiers is stored as single letters ["C","B","S","P","C","S","I","K","S","A","U","G"] (legacy format). This column is NOT read by the live scorer — 3rd places are derived from the predicted standings via Annex C. Shown here only for completeness.
